name: partner_unlocks
description: Dex-Unlock Partners (q.side_partner), both rungs end-to-end at the Sango lab: fake dex_caught to 15 via /pokedex grant, Acacia unlocks the second partner, claim Skiddo (Lv. 25), raise the dex to 30, Acacia unlocks the last partner, claim Hisuian Growlithe (Lv. 40). Assumed-faked prereqs: chose_starter + ci_starters_spawned (opening chain), the stand-in trio is respawned by the preamble, and the dex threshold is granted (DexScoreManager mirrors real CAUGHT entries every 40t, so grants are the only fakeable path; grants persist across runs but the chain is tag-gated and monotonic, so re-runs stay green). Re-runs keep the claimed Pokemon (givemon has no dupe gate).

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag the chain sets --

steps.rcon: tag {player} remove second_starter_unlocked
tag {player} remove second_starter_claimed
tag {player} remove third_starter_unlocked
tag {player} remove third_starter_claimed
tag {player} remove claimed_starter_skiddo
tag {player} remove claimed_starter_hisuian_growlithe

steps.comment: -- prereq fakes: opening-chain tags (starter chosen, trio latch spent) --

steps.rcon: tag {player} add chose_starter
tag {player} add ci_starters_spawned

steps.comment: -- anchor at the lab FIRST (chunks must be loaded for the entity reset below) --
-- stand-in trio reset: kill + respawn at Acacia's canonical import spots (import_new lands a tick or two deferred) --

steps.rcon: kill @e[tag=ci_standin_skiddo]
kill @e[tag=ci_standin_totodile]
kill @e[tag=ci_standin_growlithe]
easy_npc preset import_new data easy_npc:preset/cobblemon_npc/starter_skiddo.npc.snbt 2675.5 128 2899.5
easy_npc preset import_new data easy_npc:preset/cobblemon_npc/starter_hisuian_growlithe.npc.snbt 2676.5 128 2901.5
easy_npc preset import_new data easy_npc:preset/cobblemon_npc/starter_totodile.npc.snbt 2675.5 128 2903.5
execute if entity @e[tag=ci_standin_skiddo]
execute if entity @e[tag=ci_standin_growlithe]

steps.comment: -- dex fake, rung 1: 15 CAUGHT species (pokedex grant sets CAUGHT; DexScoreManager polls 40t; band_tags applies dex_gte_15 next tick) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon rattata level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon pidgey level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon caterpie level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon weedle level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon zubat level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon geodude level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon machop level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon abra level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon gastly level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon oddish level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon bellsprout level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon poliwag level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon tentacool level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon magnemite level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon sandshrew level=5
execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=dex_gte_15]

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Acacia notices the fifteen entries and unlocks the second partner --

steps.expect_screen_text: There is a second partner here

steps.rcon: execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=second_starter_unlocked]

steps.wait_chat: A partner is ready to choose

steps.comment: -- beat 2: claim Skiddo (Lv. 25) from the stand-in trio --

steps.rcon: execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=second_starter_claimed]
execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=claimed_starter_skiddo]

steps.wait_chat: One partner still waits at the lab

steps.comment: -- dex fake, rung 2: 15 more CAUGHT species -> dex_gte_30 --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon ekans level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon spearow level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon paras level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon venonat level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon diglett level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon meowth level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon psyduck level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon mankey level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon ponyta level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon slowpoke level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon doduo level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon seel level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon grimer level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon shellder level=5
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon drowzee level=5
execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=dex_gte_30]

steps.comment: -- beat 3: back to Acacia; thirty entries unlock the last partner --

steps.expect_screen_text: That is not luck, that is a trainer

steps.rcon: execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=third_starter_unlocked]

steps.wait_chat: A partner is ready to choose

steps.comment: -- beat 4: claim Hisuian Growlithe (Lv. 40) -- the lab empties --

steps.rcon: execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=third_starter_claimed]
execute if entity @a[name={player},tag=claimed_starter_hisuian_growlithe]
